description: We Use Ur Dih to Remove KnockBack :D

code.onTick: case 14: IAccessorTimer timer = (IAccessorTimer) ((IAccessorMinecraft) mc).getTimer(); if (timerTicks > 0 && timer.getTimerSpeed() <= 1) { float speed = 0.8f + (0.2f * (20 - timerTicks) / 20); timer.setTimerSpeed(Math.min(speed, 1f)); --timerTicks; } else if (timer.getTimerSpeed() <= 1) { timer.setTimerSpeed(1f); } break;
code.onPacket: case 14: if (player.onGround || player.fallDistance < 0.5) { hasReceivedVelocity = true; event.setCancelled(true); } break;

notes: Watchdog Modern mode (listed as 'Hypixel Morden' in the mode selector) cancels velocity packets when on ground or close to ground, then uses a timer speed manipulation to gradually restore normal tick rate over 20 ticks.
